headline: Fair Isaac (FICO) Is Down 15.4% After Rising Regulatory Heat On FICO Pricing And AI Rivals - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In recent days, Fair Isaac has come under intensified regulatory and competitive pressure as a Senate investigation into its credit score pricing, Federal Housing Finance Agency calls for more affordable scoring, and rising concerns about AI-enabled rivals converge on the business model behind its widely used FICO scores. At the same time, growing hedge fund interest, analyst optimism about the company’s core analytics franchise, and negative insider sentiment highlight a sharp divide in how...
